perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a pink Godiva x Labubu chocolate gift box. She points at the box and gestures excitedly towards the camera. (2) Close-up shots of the price tag ($899 TWD) and the purchase limit sign (Limit 2 units per card). (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room where the creator and a female friend are seated at a table. They unbox the three colorful tins (white, brown, pink) and display the collectible cards and individual chocolate wraps. (4) They hold up star-shaped and shell-shaped chocolates, showing the cross-sections of the fillings before eating them and expressing delight through wide eyes and thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female voice begins speaking quickly over upbeat, mid-tempo pop background music. The voice sounds excited and enthusiastic. (2) As the scene transitions to the unboxing, two female voices are heard interacting, one describing the price comparison with 7-11 while the other agrees. (3) Sound effects like 'ding' or sparkles are heard when highlighting specific features of the product. (4) The audio concludes with a final recommendation in a high-pitched, friendly tone as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我的天啊 好市多 竟然進這個之前' (My god, Costco actually got this before...), '味道竟然...?' (The taste is actually...?), 'Godiva & Labubu 聯名巧克力' (Godiva & Labubu co-branded chocolate). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '強強聯手' (Strong collaboration), '每卡限購兩組' (Limit 2 sets per card) in a bold red font. (3) Functional Text: Descriptions of chocolate types like '紅莓巧克力' (Raspberry chocolate) and '黑巧克力' (Dark chocolate) appear as they are tasted.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Discovery at Costco -> Price Analysis -> Indoor Unboxing -> Flavor Tasting -> Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in the Costco scenes, joined by a second female during the tasting phase.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator has long dark hair and wears a grey off-the-shoulder top with a checkered skirt. The second female wears a tan top and a white bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is shot in a Costco warehouse with stacks of pink gift boxes and high shelves. The second half is in a domestic indoor setting with a clean table and household items in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and natural window light.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and product review for the Godiva x Labubu chocolate set exclusive to Costco. It highlights the significant price advantage at Costco compared to 7-11 and provides a detailed sensory evaluation of the flavors to encourage viewers to purchase before it sells out.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed unboxing, positive tasting experience, and clear pricing information suggesting a recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'My god' opening and variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content is highly optimized for short-form video platforms with fast cuts and beat-synced editing.
